name: One punch man rpg
description:
The world of One Punch Man is a modern society constantly attacked by monsters, mysterious beings, mutants, aliens, rogue machines, and supernatural disasters. Cities are numbered instead of named because entire locations are frequently destroyed during monster attacks. Humanity survives under the protection of powerful heroes organized by the Hero Association.

Heroes are ranked based on strength, popularity, achievements, intelligence, and contribution to society. They are divided into four classes:

C-Class — Beginner heroes. Lowest rank but still above normal humans.

B-Class — Skilled heroes capable of handling stronger threats.

A-Class — Elite heroes trusted with dangerous missions.

S-Class — Monsters in human form. The strongest defenders of humanity.

Threat levels are classified as:

Wolf — Danger to a small group.

Tiger — Danger to dozens of people.

Demon — Danger to an entire city.

Dragon — Danger to multiple cities.

God — Threat to humanity itself.

The world is brutal. Heroes can become celebrities, tyrants, symbols of hope, or broken survivors. Corruption exists inside the Hero Association, monsters evolve constantly, and power has almost no known limit.

In this world, every living being is born with a natural mental and physical restriction known as a Limiter.

The Limiter exists to stop beings from becoming infinitely powerful. Most heroes train their entire lives but never surpass their natural ceiling.

However, rare individuals can weaken or completely break their limiter through extreme suffering, obsession, near-death experiences, and impossible training.

The greatest example is Saitama, a hero who broke his limiter entirely and gained limitless physical strength.

Breaking the limiter causes:

Explosive growth in strength

Superhuman adaptability

Resistance to death

Rapid evolution during battle

Abnormal physical changes

Psychological changes in some individuals

Most people die before even approaching this state.

Hero Association:The main hero organization controlling hero rankings, missions, payments, and disaster responses.

Responsibilities

Registering heroes

Assigning missions

Disaster evacuation

Threat classification

Sponsoring heroes

Public relations

Hero Classes

C-Class

B-Class

A-Class

S-Class
creator: Dickbobdick
